# Proof Path Generator

## Purpose

Ads do not need to be fully believed. They need to earn inspection.

## Proof assets

```text
interactive demo
sandbox
screenshots
docs
security page
pricing page
case study
comparison page
calculator
public changelog
review snippets
implementation guide
```

## Routing

| Buyer state | Proof path |
|---|---|
| problem-aware | diagnostic + pain proof |
| solution-aware | demo + mechanism |
| vendor-aware | comparison + reviews |
| evaluating | pricing + security + implementation |
| trialing | quick win + onboarding |
